pages.text: An &6outpost&r is a small holding planted on distant ground by raising a &6faction banner&r beyond your borders and confirming it. It lets you work resources your home borders cannot reach — a managed farm, a quarry, or a forward post on the road.
An outpost is yours alone, but it is exposed: no wall shields it and no guard keeps watch. If its banner falls, the outpost falls with it, so guard the road that supplies it.
Frontier Logistics and related research raise how many outposts your settlement can sustain at once. Each outpost is a supply commitment, not free territory.
